title: ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. divergens
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. divergens, also known as the Star of Bethlehem, is a bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the Star of Bethlehem is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
